architecture_summary: ultrainit is a Bash CLI tool that orchestrates multiple `claude -p` subprocess invocations to analyze any codebase and generate Claude Code configuration (CLAUDE.md, skills, hooks, subagents, MCP config). The core logic lives in `lib/` (phase orchestration), `prompts/` (agent system prompts), and `schemas/` (JSON output contracts). A bats-core test suite in `tests/` uses a PATH-based mock `claude` binary to test all phases without real API calls. `test-repos/` holds a realistic example output (skills, hooks, agents for open-webui) used as validation fixtures.

directories.description: Core orchestration library: one shell module per pipeline phase (gather, ask, research, synthesize, validate, merge) plus agent spawning and utilities
System prompt markdown files fed to each claude -p agent (identity, commands, git-forensics, patterns, synthesizer, etc.)
JSON Schema files defining the structured output contract for every agent and synthesis pass
Standalone shell validator scripts (validate-skill.sh, validate-subagent.sh) run in Phase 5 and also exercised by the test suite
bats-core test suite root: all unit, integration, edge, smoke tests plus helpers and fixtures
Unit tests for individual shell functions: budget logic, agent run/skip/retry, merge, synthesis helpers, validation, utils
Phase-level integration tests (gather_phase, synthesize_phase, resume) using mock claude dispatch mode
bats tests specifically for the standalone scripts/validate-skill.sh and scripts/validate-subagent.sh validators
Edge-case tests: budget exhaustion mid-run, CLI argument parsing edge cases
Smoke / end-to-end tests running the full pipeline against a minimal synthetic project
Minimal synthetic codebase used as the target for smoke-test pipeline runs
Shared bats setup helpers: tmpdir/env bootstrapping (test_helper.bash) and the PATH-based mock claude binary (mock_claude.bash)
Realistic JSON fixture files representing agent outputs, used by tests instead of real claude calls
Realistic per-agent finding fixtures (identity.json, commands.json, patterns.json, etc.)
Synthesis pass output fixtures (output-docs.json, output-tooling.json, output.json)
Valid and invalid skill fixture directories used to test the skill validator script
Subagent fixture files used to test the subagent validator script
Hook script fixtures used to test hook validation logic
Mock claude response envelope JSON files matching the real claude -p --output-format json structure
Example ultrainit output: a fully generated .claude/ config for open-webui, used as a reference and for integration validation
Complete example Claude Code config directory (skills, agents, hooks, settings.json, mcp.json) generated by ultrainit for open-webui
30+ example skill markdown files covering all major open-webui feature areas (add-api-client-function, add-db-migration, debug-chat-pipeline, etc.)
Example subagent definitions (access-control-auditor, migration-safety-reviewer, plugin-structure-validator, chat-pipeline-analyzer)
Example hook scripts generated by ultrainit (autoformat-frontend, autoformat-python, guard-protected-files, i18n-reminder)
Snapshot of the open-webui codebase used as the analysis target for the example generated config
GitHub repository root (issue templates, workflows)
GitHub Actions workflows: test.yml (bats suite on push/PR), docker-test-image.yml (rebuild test image), release.yml (bundle and publish)
Project assets: logo.png, logo.xcf (source), diagram.png, diagram.drawio (architecture diagram source)
Claude Code settings for this repo itself (settings.json, drawio skill)
